app_release_notes: v1.0.1 - Adds a Request a Refund option under the Support menu (30-day money-back, no questions asked), plus behind-the-scenes commerce hardening.

mac.app_release_notes: v1.0.1 - Adds a Request a Refund option under the Support menu (30-day money-back, no questions asked), plus behind-the-scenes commerce hardening.

windows.app_release_notes: v1.0.0 - Loadscope is out of beta. One-time purchase with lifetime updates: measure your target groups in-app, import your chronograph data, and Loadscope scores every load to call your best one. Thanks for being here early.
